challenge.explanation:
Da biste dobili tačan odgovor, pogledajte koji deo programa je Lisa detaljno objašnjava.

Objašnjava da menyu sometimes disappears or shows the wrong options.

Izaberite opciju koja odgovara direktno problematičnom dijelu aplikacije.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Nakon razgovora sa Markom, Lisa je shvatila da problem utiče na ceo tim, pa je napisala obaveštenje kako bi sve obavestila.

Hi team,

Just a quick update: I spoke with Mark about a glitching issue in the menu — it sometimes disappears or shows the wrong options and acts weird. We also noticed flickering when switching tabs. The behavior is not consistent, but it happens enough to be a problem.

After checking a few machines, I confirmed it's happening across the team. It looks like a graphics driver or rendering problem, possibly linked to event handling in the UI framework.

Please update your graphics drivers as soon as possible. If the issue continues, we'll run further diagnostics.

Let me know if you have questions.

Lisa

Koji deo programa je pokazao abnormalno ponašanje?

answers.feedback: Hakuna maelezo kuhusu skrini ya kuingia katika kumbusho.

challenge.title: Vežba 93
